message:
test(doom): add 27 tests for DoomEngine API and Bresenham line drawing (bd-2kz0c)

Cover: new() state, load_test_map, movement/strafe/look, toggle_god_mode/
toggle_run, update tick accumulation, fire flash decay, render without map,
frame counter, crosshair disabled, minimap enabled, muzzle flash overlay,
draw_line_fb Bresenham (horizontal/vertical/point/diagonal), generate_test_map
structure, Default impl, full gameplay sequence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
